suites.failure: InputController.openCommandPalette() opens a new palette when isTranscriptViewerOpen() is true.

adversarialCases.evidence: 25 Escape cycles invoked cancellation 25 times; a zero-match Enter and a disabled-only row performed no selection and did not throw.
25 controller open/Escape cycles produced 25 overlay hides and 25 composer focus restorations.
The CJK query 設定 matched 設定を開く, and every rendered line for a long title at width 20 was at most 20 visible columns.
A draft composer displayed the empty-prompt guard. A throwing app.mode.cycle action recorded hide, composer focus, execute, then registry error reporting in that strict order.
With isTranscriptViewerOpen() returning true, openCommandPalette() still called ui.showOverlay once.
Zero available/bound actions returned an empty segment; unbound app.mode.cycle was absent; changing availability immediately included the bound command-palette action.
At width 80 all emitted hints were complete bound hints within the width. app.mode.cycle was unavailable and did not execute when plan.enabled was false or goal mode was enabled.

blockers.title: Command palette stacks over an already-open transcript viewer
blockers.repro: Run bun --cwd packages/coding-agent test test/g003-ws2-redteam.test.ts. The test 'does not open a palette over an active transcript overlay' fails: InputController.openCommandPalette() invokes ui.showOverlay even when ctx.isTranscriptViewerOpen() returns true.
